use_cases: Showcasing photo collections in an interactive 3D card stack layout
Displaying product images with hover zoom and rotation effects
Creating engaging portfolio sections with animated entrance timing
Building testimonial or feature cards with depth perception
Enhancing media galleries with staggered reveal animations
ai_summary: A 3D stacked photo card component featuring hover interactions that scale and rotate cards for depth perception. Includes animated gradient grid background, staggered visibility timing, and cursor-following mouse movement effects. Ideal for interactive photo galleries, product showcases, or portfolio sections where visual depth and engagement are priorities.
